subject: I need your approval
body:
Dear JE,
I was headhunted for a position in Dubai at Island Global Yachting. I don't
know if they're interested in me, but of course I need your approval if they
would be.

Current company is fading. Shady investors, insurance fraud, and I'm just
waiting for my boss to get a Ukrainian bullet through his head.

Thinking of you, always wishing you well,

-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
